parameters.jsonBody: {"query": "SELECT campaign.id, campaign.name, campaign.status, campaign.advertising_channel_type, campaign_budget.amount_micros, campaign_budget.resource_name, metrics.cost_micros, metrics.conversions, metrics.conversions_value, metrics.clicks, metrics.impressions FROM campaign WHERE segments.date DURING LAST_30_DAYS AND campaign.status != 'REMOVED' ORDER BY metrics.cost_micros DESC LIMIT 50"}
